title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Adda247 Global Group family as a Senior Teacher in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
